name: Reprise Interactive Demo Platform API
what_it_does: Reprise enterprise interactive demo and product experience platform REST API for enterprise sales teams and presales engineers to create replicated product demos, guided tours, sandbox environments, and personalized product experiences for enterprise buyer engagement. Enables AI agents to manage demo project creation and replication for enterprise demo automation, handle demo personalization and custom branding for account-based selling automation, access demo sharing and access link management for presales distribution automation, retrieve engagement analytics and prospect interaction tracking for presales intelligence automation, manage sandbox environment provisioning for proof-of-concept automation, handle demo template library management for reusable content automation, access integration with Salesforce and HubSpot for presales CRM automation, retrieve team collaboration and review workflow for demo quality automation, manage demo localization and translation for global sales automation, and integrate Reprise with CRM, sales engagement, and presales tools for end-to-end enterprise demo workflow.
use_cases: Creating enterprise product demos from presales automation agents
Provisioning sandbox environments from POC automation agents
Personalizing demos for accounts from ABM selling agents
Tracking presales engagement from deal intelligence agents
not_for: Simple screenshot-based demos (use Navattic or Storylane for lightweight demos)
Consumer product marketing demos (use Loom or Vidyard for video demos)
Internal product training (use WalkMe or Whatfix for employee training)
best_when: An enterprise sales team or presales organization wanting AI agents to automate demo environment creation, account-personalized demo experiences, sandbox provisioning, and presales engagement analytics through Reprise's enterprise demo platform.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE IMPLEMENTATION REQUIREMENT: Reprise enterprise deployment requires technical implementation with Reprise solutions team for product replication; automated self-service Reprise integration requires implementation support; automated standalone demo creation without implementation support creates limited demo fidelity for complex enterprise products. PRODUCT REPLICATION COMPLEXITY FOR REAL-TIME DATA: Reprise demos replicate product UI as static or partially interactive experiences; automated demo creation for products with complex real-time data integrations requires custom mock data configuration; automated demo replication of real-time dashboard products creates static snapshots rather than live data experiences. SANDBOX PROVISIONING REQUIRES INFRASTRUCTURE CONFIGURATION: Reprise sandbox environments require infrastructure configuration for each product type; automated sandbox provisioning depends on pre-configured sandbox templates; automated on-demand sandbox creation without templates requires implementation engagement for each new sandbox type.

auth.notes: Reprise uses API key and OAuth for integrations. REST API with JSON. Boston, Massachusetts HQ. Founded 2020 by Sam Clemens and Ben Wright. Backed by ICONIQ Capital, Accomplice, Tiger Global ($62M raised). Products: Demo creation, product replication, sandbox environments, personalization, analytics. Integrations: Salesforce, HubSpot, Outreach, SalesLoft, Pardot. GDPR. SOC2. Serves enterprise sales teams at 200+ companies. Competes with Navattic, Demostack, and TestBox for enterprise demos.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise sales process
pricing.notes: Boston MA. ICONIQ backed. Custom enterprise pricing. Annual contract. Implementation included.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; demo and analytics queries throttled; webhooks for view, completion, and engagement events

known_agent_gotchas: API DOCUMENTATION NOT PUBLICLY AVAILABLE: Reprise API documentation requires customer account access; automated integration development requires Reprise customer portal or implementation team access; automated self-service integration without documentation requires reverse-engineering from Reprise support

DEMO vs TOUR vs SANDBOX PRODUCT TYPES: Reprise offers Replicas (full product replication), Showcases (guided tours), and Sandboxes (live environments); automated demo management must use correct product type API; automated Replica API calls on Showcase-type demos creates product type mismatch

PERSONALIZATION TOKEN INJECTION TIMING: Reprise demo personalization tokens (company name, logo) can be injected at share time or at view time; automated personalization must specify injection timing; automated share-time injection creates static personalization visible to all viewers if link is reshared; automated view-time injection requires viewer identification mechanism

DEMO ANALYTICS REQUIRE IDENTIFIED VIEWER: Reprise prospect-level engagement analytics require viewer identification via email or CRM sync; automated intelligence from anonymous demo views cannot create individual lead profiles; automated prospect identification mechanism must be configured before reliable engagement tracking

ENTERPRISE IMPLEMENTATION AS PREREQUISITE: Reprise demo replication requires human-driven implementation to set up product clone; automated workflows assume demo templates are already created by Reprise implementation team; automated demo generation from scratch via API alone is not the intended use model
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise demo. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth. US. Demo engagement and presales data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise demo. GDPR, SOC2. API key/OAuth. US. Presales data.
